description: Style Note It's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee and up your style quotient. Product Details White shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perforations  Padded and meshed tongue and inner  Foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves, pivot point on the forefoot, scooped heel and hexagonal nubs on the heel Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
